# E2E CI Playwright (`ci-e2e-playwright.yml`)

**Triggers**: `pull_request`, `push`, `workflow_dispatch`

```mermaid
graph TD
    classDef gate fill:#4a9eff,stroke:#2563eb,color:#fff
    classDef plumbing fill:#a78bfa,stroke:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    classDef test fill:#34d399,stroke:#059669,color:#fff
    classDef collation fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
    classDef sideeffect fill:#f87171,stroke:#dc2626,color:#fff

    changes{{"Determine need to run E2E checks"}}
    playwright["Playwright E2E tests"]
    capture-run-time["Capture run time"]
    handle-screenshots("Handle screenshot changes")
    playwright_tests[["Playwright tests pass"]]

    changes -->|shouldRun| playwright
    changes -->|shouldRun| capture-run-time
    playwright --> capture-run-time
    changes -->|shouldRun| handle-screenshots
    playwright --> handle-screenshots
    handle-screenshots --> playwright_tests
    playwright --> playwright_tests

    class changes gate
    class playwright test
    class capture-run-time test
    class handle-screenshots sideeffect
    class playwright_tests collation
```

## Legend

| Shape        | Color  | Meaning                   |
| ------------ | ------ | ------------------------- |
| Hexagon      | Blue   | Gate / change detection   |
| Stadium      | Purple | Plumbing / matrix builder |
| Rectangle    | Green  | Test / core work          |
| Subroutine   | Yellow | Collation / status gate   |
| Rounded rect | Red    | Side effect / snapshots   |

Edge labels show the change-detection output that gates the job.

## Job details

| Job                  | Depends on                     | Condition                                  | Matrix |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------ | ------ |
| `changes`            | -                              | github.event_name == 'push' \|\| github... | -      |
| `playwright`         | changes                        | shouldRun                                  | -      |
| `capture-run-time`   | changes, playwright            | github.actor != 'dependabot[bot]' && ...   | -      |
| `handle-screenshots` | playwright, changes            | needs.changes.outputs.mode == 'update...   | -      |
| `playwright_tests`   | playwright, handle-screenshots | -                                          | -      |
